content: Tighten the existing storage-boundary record if this is the same meaning. Do not fork it into a duplicate.
I will check existing nearby records before updating anything.
This session sharpened the main storage split rule: keep product state and queue runtime state separate because lifecycle and recovery semantics differ.
The routing detail about reading context DB for product queries is just the application of that stronger storage-boundary decision.
Do not update the separate routing record if it is already correct. Improve the main storage-boundary record only.
